evals.prompt: Review Seer comments on PR #312 and tell me what to fix vs skip.
evals.expected_output: Fetches seer-by-sentry[bot] comments via gh; reports Resolved/Skipped table even if count is zero; does not invent findings.

evals.prompt: Find open PRs that have unresolved Seer feedback.
evals.expected_output: Scans recent open PRs, prints PR numbers with Seer comment counts; uses bot login seer-by-sentry[bot].

evals.prompt: Sentry left a HIGH severity finding on app/src/middleware.ts about a null check — verify and fix if real.
evals.expected_output: Reads the cited file/line, classifies confirmed vs false positive, applies minimal fix only if confirmed, ends with Seer Review report template.
